name: 06-05-rvv-gearbox-autotuning-pass-reference
title: Stage2 RVV Gearbox pass MVP for typed conversion route control
description: Implement one bounded RVV plugin-local Gearbox pass MVP for an existing typed conversion path: materialize explicit gear/schedule facts from structural tcrv_rvv dequantization body/config facts, require the RVV provider to consume them before route construction, and keep target metadata as mirrors only.
creator: codex
notes: Repaired from Gearbox reference intake into a concrete Stage2 RVV Gearbox pass MVP. The v3 artifact remains non-authoritative reference input.
